backstory.original: Selise is of the Turami people, who trained to become a Paladin after losing her beloved wife right in front of her. In her travels, she came across the Rivals and joined up, despite her misgivings about the group. In the time she's been with them, she finally found the one she swore vengeance upon; but in doing so she lost her connection to Tyr.
backstory.display: 赛丽斯是图拉米人，在眼看着挚爱的妻子死去后，她接受训练，成为了一名圣武士。在旅途中她遇到了对手团，尽管心存疑虑，她还是加入了这个组织。在与大家共度的这段时光里，她终于找到了她发誓要报复的人。但她也因此而失去了与提尔的联系。

description.original: Selise attacks the nearest enemy and bashes them, stunning them for 2 seconds.
description.display: 赛丽斯攻击距离最近的敌人并发动盾牌猛击，使其眩晕 2 秒。

longDescription.original: Bash the enemy before attacking them, stunning them for 2 seconds. This can cause hits- and armor-based enemies to take two hits.
longDescription.display: 攻击敌人前先发动盾牌猛击，使其眩晕 2 秒。此攻击对于附带命中次数或护甲的敌人算作两次攻击。

description.original: When used, Selise will switch to Wall stance.
description.display: 使用后赛丽斯将切换至坚壁姿态。

longDescription.original: When used, Selise will switch to Wall stance.
longDescription.display: 使用后赛丽斯将切换至坚壁姿态。

description.original: Selise buffs the Damage of Champions behind her and unlocks 4 unique bonus effects based on her Shield Stance
description.display: 赛丽斯为身后的勇士提供伤害增益，同时根据她的盾牌姿态解锁 4 种独特的加成效果

conditions.desc: Selise increases the damage of Champions in the three columns behind her by $amount%. Bonus effects are provided based on Selise's current stance, which can be changed by using her Ultimate Attack.
Selise increases the damage of Champions in the two columns behind her by $amount%. Bonus effects are provided based on Selise's current stance, which can be changed by using her Ultimate Attack.

^^Aggressive: Champions affected by Divine Sense have their base attack cooldowns reduced by $(amount___4)s.^^Wall: Increases the effects of Divine Sense by $(amount___5)% when Selise has been attacked in the last $(seconds_since_attacked___5) seconds. Additionally, Champions in the same column as Selise take $(amount___6)% less damage from melee and ranged attacks.^^Last Resort: Increases the base effect of Vow of Vengeance by $(amount___8)%. This buff is additively reduced by $(reduce_amount___8)% every $(update_time___8) seconds Selise is in Last Resort stance, and additively increased by $(increase_amount___8)% every $(update_time___8) seconds Selise is not in Last Resort stance. (Current buff amount: $selise_last_resort_buff_amount%)^^Current stance: $(selise_stance)

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target takes $amount% less damage from Melee Attacks and Ranged Attacks

conditions.desc: 赛丽斯为处于她后方三列的勇士提高 $amount% 伤害。奖励效果根据赛丽斯的当前姿态提供，可通过使用她的杀招来更改。
赛丽斯为处于她后方两列的勇士提高 $amount% 伤害。奖励效果根据赛丽斯的当前姿态提供，可通过使用她的杀招来更改。

^^激进：被“神圣感知”影响的勇士基本攻击冷却时间减少 $(amount___4) 秒。^^坚壁：赛丽斯在最近 $(seconds_since_attacked___5) 秒内受到攻击时，提升“神圣感知”的效果 $(amount___5)%。此外，与赛丽斯同列的勇士受到的近战和远程攻击伤害降低 $(amount___6)%。^^死斗：提升“复仇誓言”的基本效果 $(amount___8)%。赛丽斯每处于死斗姿态下 $(update_time___8) 秒，此增益追加降低 $(reduce_amount___8)%；赛丽斯不处于死斗姿态时，此效果每 $(update_time___8) 秒额外增加 $(increase_amount___8)%。（当前增益：$selise_last_resort_buff_amount%^^当前姿态：$(selise_stance)）

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target受到的近战和远程攻击伤害降低 $amount%

tipText.original: Selise has 3 different stances that provide unique bonus effects and buffs to the Champions behind her.
tipText.display: 赛丽斯有 3 种不同姿态，可为自身后方的勇士提供独特的奖励效果与增益。

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% of $source's Max Health. This is increased by 5% for each other Rivals of Waterdeep Champion in the formation applied additively.
提升其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $(not_buffed amount)%阵型中每有一位其他的“深水城的竞争对手”勇士，此加成即增加 5%。以加算方式堆叠。

While in Aggressive stance, Selise will toss her shield in an arc targeted at the farthest enemy every 4th attack. It deals damage and stuns all enemies hit for 2 seconds. If the enemy is armor/hits-based it takes double hits from all attacks until Selise attacks with Shield of Psychomancy again or changes stances.
在激进姿态的每第 4 次攻击时，赛丽斯会瞄准最远的敌人并呈弧形掷出她的盾牌。盾牌会造成伤害并使所有敌人眩晕 2 秒。若敌人为基于护甲/击中，则在赛丽斯使用“心灵之盾”再次攻击或改变姿态之前，将从所有攻击受到双倍打击。

While not in Aggressive stance, Selise increases the effect of Divine Sense by $amount% each time an enemy attacks her, stacking multiplicatively up to $(max_stacks___3) times and resetting when changing areas. Stacks do not reset when changing stances.

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_vow_of_vengeance_active)

description.desc: 不处于激进姿态时，每被一名敌人攻击，赛丽斯即提升“神圣感知”的效果 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多 $(max_stacks___3) 层；在变更区域后重置。改变姿态时，堆叠不会重置。

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_vow_of_vengeance_active)

description.desc: When switching from Last Resort to Aggressive stance, Selise channels the divine power of Tyr and attacks a random enemy with her sword, dealing BUD-based AoE damage and BUD-based chaining lightning damage from the enemy struck to five nearby enemies. This effect can only trigger every $amount seconds.

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_thunderous_smite_cooldown_remaining)

description.desc: 从死斗姿态切换到激进姿态时，赛丽斯引导提尔的神力，用剑攻击随机敌人，造成基于基础杀招伤害的范围伤害，并对目标周围五名敌人造成基于基础杀招伤害的连环闪电。此效果在 $amount 秒内仅可触发一次。

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_thunderous_smite_cooldown_remaining)

tipText.original: Selise unleashes a powerful Thunderous Smite on multiple enemies when she moves from her Last Resort Stance to her Aggressive stance.
tipText.display: 从死斗姿态转为激进姿态时，赛丽斯对多名敌人施放强大的雷霆猛击。

description.desc: While in Aggressive stance armored or hits-based enemies affected by Shield of Psychomancy now take triple hits from all attacks.
处于激进姿态时，受“心灵之盾”影响的基于护甲或击中的敌人会从所有攻击受到三倍击中。

specializationDescription.original: Selise focuses on her Aggressive stance, increasing hits against armored and hit-based enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯集中精神展开激进姿态，增加对上基于护甲和击中的敌人时的击中次数。

description.desc: While in Wall stance, Selise can deflect projectiles back at the enemies that shot/cast them, dealing $(seconds_worth_of_bud) seconds of BUD-based damage.

conditions.desc: ^She can deflect one attack for each deflection stack she has, and gains deflection stacks by attacking while in Wall stance.^^$(selise_reflective_shield_active)

description.desc: 处于坚壁姿态时，赛丽斯可以偏折远程与法术投射物，并使其反弹回攻击者身上，造成等同于 $(seconds_worth_of_bud) 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。

conditions.desc: ^每拥有一层偏折层数，她可以偏折一次攻击，在坚壁姿态下发动攻击可获得偏折堆叠层数。^^$(selise_reflective_shield_active)

specializationDescription.original: Selise focuses on her Wall stance, reflecting projectiles.
specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯专注于坚壁姿态，反射投射物。

description.pre: While in Last Resort stance, Selise takes reduced damage the further her health falls below 80%.

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_mithral_skin_active)

description.pre: 处于死斗姿态时，如果赛丽斯的生命值低于 80%，则减少所受伤害。

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_mithral_skin_active)

specializationDescription.original: Selise focuses on her Last Resort stance, decreasing damage as her health falls.
specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯专注于死斗姿态，在生命值下降时减少受到的伤害。

description.desc: Divine Sense is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Rivals of Waterdeep affiliated Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每存在一个“深水城的竞争对手”勇士，“神圣感知”提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Increases the range of Divine Sense to affect the three columns behind Selise rather than just two.
将神圣感知的影响范围扩大至赛丽斯身后三列，而非之前的两列。

specializationDescription.original: Selise focuses on her Divine Sense, buffing even more Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯专注于神圣感知，为更多勇士提供加成。

description.desc: While in Aggressive stance armored or hits-based enemies affected by Shield of Psychomancy now take triple hits from all attacks.
处于激进姿态时，受“心灵之盾”影响的基于护甲或击中的敌人会从所有攻击受到三倍击中。

specializationDescription.original: Selise focuses on her Aggressive stance, increasing hits against armored and hit-based enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯集中精神展开激进姿态，增加对上基于护甲和击中的敌人时的击中次数。

conditions.desc: ^She can deflect one attack for each deflection stack she has, and gains deflection stacks by attacking while in Wall stance.^^$(selise_reflective_shield_active)

conditions.desc: ^每拥有一层偏折层数，她可以偏折一次攻击，在坚壁姿态下发动攻击可获得偏折堆叠层数。^^$(selise_reflective_shield_active)

specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯专注于坚壁姿态，反射投射物。

specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯集中精神展开激进姿态，增加对上基于护甲和击中的敌人时的击中次数。

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_mithral_skin_active)

description.pre: 处于死斗姿态时，如果赛丽斯的生命值低于 80%，则减少所受伤害。

conditions.desc: ^^$(selise_mithral_skin_active)

specializationDescription.original: Selise focuses on her Last Resort stance, decreasing damage as her health falls.
specializationDescription.display: 赛丽斯专注于死斗姿态，在生命值下降时减少受到的伤害。

description.original: I have devoted my all to this quest.
description.display: 我将自己的一切都奉献给了这个目标。

description.original: Don't make me go momma bear on that beholder.
description.display: 别逼得我跑去吓唬那个眼魔。

description.original: There's wrong, and then there's right. Which side do you stand?
description.display: 这个世界有对，也有错。你站在哪一边呢？

description.original: You did NOT just try to stun me, did you?
description.display: 你刚才不会是想击晕我吧？

effects.description: Increases the stun duration of Selise's base attack while in Aggressive stance by $amount seconds

description.original: The lord of justice knows no bias.
description.display: 正义之神是不会偏袒任何一方的。

description.original: He's always watching.
description.display: 他时刻警戒着。

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown of Thunderous Smite by $amount%

description.original: Tiamat cannot be left to idle in the mortal realm.
description.display: 在凡人的国度，不能让提亚马特闲下来。

description.original: I worry that my thirst for vengeance clouds my judgement.
description.display: 恐怕我对复仇的渴望已经屏蔽了我的判断。

description.original: Anyone else see the gelatinous cube down the hall?
description.display: 还有人看到走廊那头的凝胶立方怪了吗？

description.original: Tyr supports my quest, I wouldn't suggest getting in my way.
description.display: 我的使命获得了提尔的许可，所以我建议你们别挡我的路。

description.original: I've seen worse.
description.display: 我见过更糟糕的情况。

description.original: You have to curve the wood JUST right for it to fly.
description.display: 你得将木盾弯曲一定的斜度才能将它弹飞出去。

description.original: Justice must perservere and so will I.
description.display: 正义必须得到坚持，而我也是。

description.original: You really going to try me?
description.display: 你真的要来和我练练？

description.original: Please. I've faced Graz'zt and Tiamat. This is nothing.
description.display: 拜托。我可是和格拉兹特和提亚马特打过照面的。这不算什么。

description.original: As long as power flows through my roots, I will fight.
description.display: 只要力量还在根系中流淌，我就会战斗。

description.original: Tyr, give me strength!
description.display: 提尔，请赐予我力量！

effects.description: Increases the damage of Thunderous Smite by $amount% and prevents roaming familiars from automatically activating Selise's ultimate attack.

description.original: Evade this.
description.display: 躲开。

description.original: I've killed Death. You're nothing compared to that.
description.display: 死神我都宰过。你算啥。

description.original: Did you really think you could get away?
description.display: 你真的以为能够逃脱吗？

character_sheet_details.backstory: Selise is of the Turami people, who trained to become a Paladin after losing her beloved wife right in front of her. In her travels, she came across the Rivals and joined up, despite her misgivings about the group. In the time she's been with them, she finally found the one she swore vengeance upon; but in doing so she lost her connection to Tyr.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Selise uses 4 different shield stances to alter her buffs and attacks

event_upgrades.description: Selise buffs the Damage of Champions behind her and unlocks 4 unique bonus effects based on her Shield Stance

display.description: 你得将木盾弯曲一定的斜度才能将它弹飞出去。

original.name: Holy Vow
original.description: I worry that my thirst for vengeance clouds my judgement.

display.name: 虔诚誓约
display.description: 恐怕我对复仇的渴望已经屏蔽了我的判断。

original.name: Divine Vow
original.description: Tyr supports my quest, I wouldn't suggest getting in my way.

display.name: 神圣誓约
display.description: 我的使命获得了提尔的许可，所以我建议你们别挡我的路。

original.name: Reflective Coating
original.description: You did NOT just try to stun me, did you?

effects.description: Increases the stun duration of Selise's base attack while in Aggressive stance by $amount seconds

display.name: 反射涂层
display.description: 你刚才不会是想击晕我吧？

effects.description: 激进姿态下，提升赛丽斯基本攻击的眩晕持续时间 $amount 秒

original.name: Eyes of Tiwaz
original.description: He's always watching.

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown of Thunderous Smite by $amount%

display.name: 提瓦兹之眼
display.description: 他时刻警戒着。

effects.description: 使“雷霆猛击”的冷却时间减少 $amount%

original.name: Tyr's Example
original.description: Tiamat cannot be left to idle in the mortal realm.

display.name: 提尔的榜样
display.description: 在凡人的国度，不能让提亚马特闲下来。

original.name: Observant
original.description: Anyone else see the gelatinous cube down the hall?

display.name: 洞察
display.description: 还有人看到走廊那头的凝胶立方怪了吗？

original.name: Tough
original.description: I've seen worse.

display.name: 坚韧
display.description: 我见过更糟糕的情况。

original.name: Resilient
original.description: Justice must perservere and so will I.

display.name: 韧性
display.description: 正义必须得到坚持，而我也是。

original.name: Defensive Duelist
original.description: You really going to try me?

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 你真的要来和我练练？

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.description: Please. I've faced Graz'zt and Tiamat. This is nothing.

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 拜托。我可是和格拉兹特和提亚马特打过照面的。这不算什么。

original.name: Sentinel
original.description: As long as power flows through my roots, I will fight.

display.name: 哨兵
display.description: 只要力量还在根系中流淌，我就会战斗。

original.name: Shield Throw
original.description: Evade this.

display.name: 盾牌投掷
display.description: 躲开。

original.name: Champion of Tyr
original.description: Tyr, give me strength!

effects.description: Increases the damage of Thunderous Smite by $amount% and prevents roaming familiars from automatically activating Selise's ultimate attack.

display.name: 提尔的勇士
display.description: 提尔，请赐予我力量！

effects.description: 提升“雷霆猛击”的伤害 $amount%，避免游荡魔宠自动激活赛丽斯的杀招攻击。

original.name: Taunt
original.description: I've killed Death. You're nothing compared to that.

display.name: 嘲讽
display.description: 死神我都宰过。你算啥。

original.name: Nowhere to Run
original.description: Did you really think you could get away?

display.name: 无处可逃
display.description: 你真的以为能够逃脱吗？
